creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Distfile has been removed and submitter can not update the port for the 
new version.  Closing this PR accordingly. 

=> INIT.2008-10-24.tgz doesn't seem to exist in 
/tmp/distfiles/ksh93-devel.

http://www.research.att.com/sw/download/beta/.

ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ksh93-devel/. 
fetch: 
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ksh93-devel/INIT.2008-10-24.tgz:
